docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARSHALL DUPRE AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON WALTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08 TRIAL OF AUG-28-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON WALTER
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO WALTER JACKSON, NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR HRG.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-24-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-15-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARSHALL DUPRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACKSON WALTER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON WALTER
